name: ʏᴜᴍɪ
description: A Telegram Player Bot developed in Python using Pyrogram and Py-Tgcalls for seamless media playback.

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID, obtainable from your Telegram app settings.

API_HASH.description: API Hash associated with your Telegram account.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Token for the bot generated by BotFather on Telegram.

MONGO_DB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string for data storage, available from MongoDB Atlas.

OWNER_ID.description: User ID of the bot owner, for administrative access.

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: API key for accessing your Heroku account, if deploying on Heroku.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Name of your Heroku application for deployment.

LOGGER_ID.description: Log group ID for monitoring bot activities; ensure the bot has admin rights.
